Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Lawn Care to get the job done right.

“After three failed attempts with other companies, Summit finally fixed our standing water issues near the Crabtree watershed. Their deep plugs and sand mix made an immediate difference - our backyard no longer turns into a swamp after summer storms. The technician even pointed out where the builder had buried construction debris that was causing drainage problems.”

Marshall T. Red Clay Lawn Aeration
Mar 15, 2025

“Moving from California, we had no idea how to deal with Raleigh's red clay. Summit's soil prep and custom seed blend gave us a lush lawn by Thanksgiving despite starting in September. Their follow-up visits caught early fungus spots before they spread, saving us thousands compared to our neighbors who had to resod.”

Priya K. New Construction Lawn Establishment
Jan 22, 2025

“Finding someone who understands Oakwood's preservation requirements was a challenge until Summit. They revived our 1920s ribbon lawn using archival photos and hand-tied the new edging to match original patterns. Most importantly, their light equipment hasn't damaged the antique brick walkways like previous services did.”

Eleanor W. Historic Home Lawn Care
Nov 5, 2024

“When the December ice storm took down our magnolia, Summit had crews out before the power came back on. They saved what could be salvaged and documented everything for insurance. What impressed me most was how they protected the remaining grass with plywood paths during cleanup - no ruts or compaction like last time.”

Carlos R. Storm Damage Cleanup
Dec 18, 2024

“Our lawn used to go dormant by June every year. Two seasons with Summit's program and we've got green grass through August without excessive watering. Their soil temperature monitoring ensures treatments actually work instead of just following some corporate calendar. Worth every penny for Raleigh homeowners.”

Danielle H. Turf Builder Program
Feb 28, 2025

“As a retired NC State soil scientist, I'm picky about lawn services. Summit's aeration depth matches university recommendations exactly, and their pH adjustments account for our neighborhood's unique mineral content. Finally found a team that speaks my language - they even discussed my soil test results in detail.”

James L. Red Clay Lawn Aeration
Oct 11, 2024
Summit Lawn Care

Trusted lawn care professionals serving Raleigh, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
